title: Kabakaburi Living Heritage Archive (Kabakaburi)
learning_objectives: Document traditional songs, recordings, performances, and sonic heritage
activities: Explore traditional songs, recordings, performances, and sonic heritage
assessment: Learners synthesize source evidence into a culturally grounded performance or analysis task.
locale_context_statement: This module integrates hinterland community knowledge, land-based listening, and local instrument craft traditions.
locale_regional_examples: Village celebration song cycles in Kamarang/Warawatta and Waramaong
Handmade percussion from locally available materials in Kabakaburi and Santa Rosa
